message: I came to the members-only high-end club, Kasbah, brought by Tonny.
However, unfortunately, it seems like they are not open today.
More importantly, even if they were open, it's unclear if I'd be let in.
Here I am in front of Club Cabas. The door is tightly shut, and it doesn’t seem like they’re operating. That means there are probably no customers today.
Even if they were open, I'd have to catch a member somewhere to get in.
Club Cabas. A members-only, completely reservation-only club. No matter who is inside, I can't get in.
Sadly, it seems impossible to investigate inside. I think I'll leave before the intimidating bodyguard comes out.
